  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CanvasWindow
     
    CloseButtonStrategy
    A mouse interaction strategy that closes a Subwindow when the close button is clicked.
    Column
    Represents a column in a table, including its name, type, blank-value policy, and default value.
    ColumnDefaultValueAccess
     
    ColumnDefaultValueEditor
     
    ColumnNameAccess
     
    ColumnRepository
    Manages the collection of columns in a table and notifies observers about changes.
    ColumnRepositoryObserver
     
    ColumnRowRenderer
     
    ColumnsController
    Controller for managing column-related operations within a single table.
    ColumnType
     
    ColumnTypeValidator
    Utility class to validate if a column's current type is compatible with all existing row values and the default value.
    DragStrategy
    A strategy that allows the user to drag a Subwindow by its title bar.
    EditAnySubwindowStrategy
    Generic strategy for delegating mouse interactions to any editable subwindow.
    KeyCombo
     
    MainWindow
     
    MouseInteractionDispatcher
    Handles delegation of mouse events to the appropriate interaction strategy.
    MouseInteractionStrategy
     
    NameAccess<T>
     
    NameEditor<T>
     
    NameGenerationStrategy
    This code uses the strategy pattern to eliminate duplicate code for naming newly added tables or collumns.
    NameGenerator
     
    OpenTableStrategy
    A MouseInteractionStrategy that opens a new TableDesignSubwindow when the user double-clicks on a table name in a TableSubwindow.
    ResizeStrategy
    A MouseInteractionStrategy that allows a user to resize a subwindow by dragging its borders or corners.
    Row
    Represents a single row in a table, holding a list of string values.
    RowsController
    Controller for managing row-related operations within a table.
    RowValueAccess
     
    RowValueEditor
     
    ScrollablePanel
     
    ScrollableWindow
     
    Scrollbar
     
    ScrollInteractionStrategy
     
    SequentialNamingStrategy
     
    Subwindow
    Abstract base class for all types of subwindows in the UI.
    Subwindow.ResizeZone
    Enum representing the 9 zones that can be used to resize a subwindow.
    SubwindowFactory
    Factory class responsible for creating all types of subwindows in a consistent manner.
    SubwindowManager
     
    Table
    Represents a table, containing a list of columns and rows.
    TableDesignSubwindow
    A subwindow that provides an interface to edit the structure (columns) of a table.
    TableNameAccess
     
    TableRepository
    Repository for managing multiple tables.
    TableRowsSubwindow
    A subwindow that displays and allows editing of rows in a table.
    TablesController
    Controller for managing operations on tables through the TableRepository.
    TableSubwindow
    A subwindow that displays and allows editing of tables in a TableRepository.
    UIConstants
